tasks.title: Define workflow contract and repository structure
acceptance_criteria: Workflow roles and artifacts are defined.

tasks.title: Build task graph and lifecycle management
acceptance_criteria: The system can identify the next ready task.

tasks.title: Implement bounded coding execution harness
acceptance_criteria: A run can target one task and one backend agent.
Runs store prompts, metadata, and summaries.

tasks.title: Add review gate and handoff artifacts
acceptance_criteria: Review outcome can move tasks to done or needs_changes.

tasks.title: Add maintenance and git workflow hooks
acceptance_criteria: The system can prepare isolated worktrees.
Low-risk maintenance can be scheduled and audited.
